halloumi-with-cured-olives-and-thyme.name: Halloumi With Cured Olives And Thyme
instructions: Heat a medium skillet, preferably cast iron or nonstick, over medium. Add 1 Tbsp. oil and swirl to coat pan. Add Halloumi and cook undisturbed until cheese is deep golden brown, about 2 minutes. Using a thin flexible spatula, release cheese from skillet and toss. Cook, tossing occasionally, until a few more sides are golden brown, about 5 minutes (don’t worry about getting all sides browned).
Remove skillet from heat and toss in thyme and red pepper flakes. Divide Halloumi mixture and olives among small plates and drizzle with more oil.

halloumi-chickpea-and-tomato-salad-with-.name: Halloumi, Chickpea, And Tomato Salad With Mint

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Stir chickpeas, tomatoes, green onions, mint, lemon juice, and olive oil in a salad bowl. Season with salt and pepper; set aside.

Heat a dry nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add halloumi to the hot pan and cook, turning once, until deeply browned, 1 to 2 minutes per side. Remove to a cutting board and chop into 1/2-inch chunks.
Stir halloumi into the salad and serve immediately.

halloween-halfling-meatloaf.name: Halloween Halfling Meatloaf
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Mix together the ground beef, sausage, onion, saltine cracker crumbs, beaten eggs, and cajun seasoning in a bowl until well combined. In a large baking dish, form the meat loaf mixture into a Halfling shape, with a large head, 2 stubby legs, and 2 upraised arms.

Bake in the preheated oven until the meatloaf is no longer pink inside and just starting to turn brown, about 1 hour. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (70 degrees C).

To decorate the meatloaf's head, pick out about 14 corn kernels, and arrange them into teeth. Place 1 small green pepper slice on each side of the creature's head for ears; place two pickle slices on the face for eyes, then place 2 black olive halves, cut sides down, in the pickle slices to finish the eyes. One more olive half forms the nose. Surround the monster with a background of ketchup 'blood,' and bake until browned, about 10 more minutes.
Let the meatloaf rest for 10 minutes before serving. Just before serving, stick a paring knife in the meatloaf's body, and decorate it with a little ketchup blood.

halva-lezzet.name: Halva
instructions: 1. Take and boil water and sugar in the pot.
2. Take the pot from the stove when it comes to the cash.
3. Take the butter into another pot.
4. Add and roast the clay when it starts to light fokurdama.
5. When the color of the Unin changed, add the grace to the clay and continuous mixing.
6. Cook until you completely pull the flour.
7. Take the service plate by shape the spoon when the halva is light.
8. Serve mulded walnuts on it.
9. Check out the classic unhelbud recipe.

ham-and-cheese-biscuit-muffins.name: Ham And Cheese Biscuit Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line 8 cups of a standard muffin tin with paper liners.

Roll each biscuit until 1/4 inch thick. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese and ham. Wrap biscuit dough around the filling, pinch the edges to seal, and form into a ball. Press into the prepared muffin cups. Brush with beaten egg and sprinkle with bagel seasoning.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 12 minutes.

hanger-steak-with-mushrooms-and-red-wine.name: Hanger Steak With Mushrooms And Red Wine Sauce
instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms; cook, stirring occasionally, until soft and golden, about 7 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Transfer to a bowl; set aside.

Melt 1 Tbsp. butter with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in same skillet over medium heat. Season steak with salt and cracked pepper. Add steak, garlic, and rosemary to skillet. Cook about 3 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer to a cutting board. Let rest while preparing sauce.

Discard garlic and rosemary from skillet. Pour off all but 1 Tbsp. fat. Add wine; cook, stirring up bits, until reduced to ¾ cup, about 3 minutes. Strain; return liquid to skillet. Stir in stock; bring to a boil. Simmer until reduced to ½ cup, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; Whisk in 3 Tbsp. butter. Stir in mushrooms and 1 Tbsp. tarragon. Season with salt and pepper.
Spoon mushroom mixture onto plates. Thinly slice steak; serve over mushrooms. Garnish with remaining 1 Tbsp. tarragon.

hanger-steak-with-shallots-and-jerusalem.name: Hanger Steak With Shallots And Jerusalem Artichokes

ingredients.prep: center membrane removed, cut into 4 pieces

ingredients.item: Fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves with tender stems

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Heat butter in a large ovenproof skillet over medium heat. Cook shallots, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Add pepper, 1 tsp. salt, and 2 Tbsp. vinegar and toss. Roast shallots in oven, checking after 10 minutes and shaking pan to turn and adding a splash or so of water if butter is burning, until tender, 10–20 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk oil, chile, and remaining ¼ cup vinegar in a large bowl; season with salt (vinaigrette will separate as it sits).
When shallots are done cooking, whisk vinaigrette, add shallots, and toss gently.

Cook Jerusalem artichokes in a large saucepan of boiling, generously salted water until tender, 10–12 minutes. Drain; return to saucepan. Cook over medium heat, tossing, until dry, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat, add cream and butter, and stir to combine. Purée in a blender. With motor running, gradually add oil and blend until emulsified; season with salt. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl; discard solids.

Prepare grill for medium-high heat. Season steaks with salt and grill, turning occasionally, until lightly charred and an instant-read thermometer registers 130° for medium-rare, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board. Squeeze lemons over and drizzle with oil; season with pepper. Let rest 5–10 minutes before slicing.

Spoon purée onto plates and place steak around. Top with shallots, leaving vinaigrette in pan. Toss herbs and fennel fronds in vinaigrette; season with salt. Top steak with salad and drizzle with oil.

hanger-steak-with-spicy-lemon-couscous.name: Hanger Steak With Spicy Lemon Couscous

ingredients.prep: ends trimmed, seeded, finely chopped (with skin)

instructions: Season steak with salt and pepper. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook steak until medium-rare, about 4 minutes per side (or 2 minutes per side if using skirt steak). Transfer steak to a plate.

Wipe out skillet; add remaining 2 tablespoons oil and heat over medium-high heat. Add garlic and red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, until garlic begins to brown, about 1 minute. Add carrots, fennel, and lemon; season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing occasionally, until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 4 minutes.

Add broth to skillet and bring to a boil. Stir in couscous. Remove from heat; cover and let steam until tender, 5-8 minutes. Add olives, season with salt and pepper, and fluff couscous with a fork. Slice steak against the grain; fold into couscous. Divide lemon couscous among plates, drizzle with oil, and garnish with cilantro.

harvest-walnut-pumpkin-pie.name: Harvest Walnut Pumpkin Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Combine pumpkin, condensed milk, eggs, maple extract, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, salt, ginger, and nutmeg in a large bowl; mix well. Pour into graham cracker crust; smooth top with a spatula.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C). Continue baking until filling is set, about 30 minutes more.
Meanwhile, combine brown sugar, flour, and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon in a bowl; cut in butter with a fork until coarse crumbs form. Stir in walnuts.
Remove pie from oven; sprinkle evenly with walnut topping. Continue baking until topping is golden brown, about 10 minutes. Cool completely before slicing.

hazelnut-cake-lezzet.name: Hazelnut Cake
instructions: 1. Beat eggs, sunflower oil, sugar and vanilla from a large glass bowl to foam.
2. Add Yoğurdu and continue to cook.
3. Add flour to the mixture, baking powder, drop chocolate and fill from half of the barrel, and mix the dough with wooden spoon until a soft consistency area.
4. Pour lubricated caliba nuts and add a mixture on it, preheated in the oven, pre-heated.
5. slice and serve after cooling.
6. You can also try the wet cake recipe, one of the most loved varieties.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

healthy-mediterranean-salad.name: Healthy Mediterranean Salad
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200°C).
Place chicken breast on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil or parchment paper. Top with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, dill, and salt and pepper to season.
Bake for 35-40 minutes until internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C) and the juices run clear.
Add all dressing ingredients in a small bowl or cup and whisk until with a fork until combined.
Slice thinly or cube chicken, cutting to your preference for topping the salad.
Assemble your salad, starting with a base of romaine lettuce. Then top with chicken, cucumber, olives, red onion, tomatoes, feta, and the dressing. Toss to evenly incorporate ingredients
Enjoy!

heavenly-apple-of-thigh-dessert.name: Heavenly 'apple Of Thigh' Dessert
instructions: Mix together the cream cheese, sugar and 1/4 cup of the caramel sauce in a medium bowl. Spread onto a serving tray or a plate. Drizzle the remaining caramel sauce over the top and sprinkle with pieces of chocolate covered toffee. Refrigerate for 30 minutes, then serve with apple slices.

herb-dough-balls-lezzet.name: Herb Dough Balls
instructions: 1. thoroughly mix yogurt, eggs, carbonate, pepper and salt in a wide container.
2. Add fresh pepper and cake.
3. Azar knead a soft dough by adding flour.
4. Fill the dough into the clamping bag.
5. Oil your hand and rub your squeezing bag from small pieces of dough oil.
6. Buy excess oil unfiltered paper for ruberine.
7. Serve hot or warm.

herb-butter-turkey.name: Herb-butter Turkey
instructions: Melt 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a large deep skillet over medium-high heat. Cook 2 lb. turkey necks and/or wings, turning occasionally, until deeply browned, 12–15 minutes. Add 2 medium onions, coarsely chopped, 2 medium carrots, peeled, coarsely chopped, and 4 medium celery stalks, coarsely chopped, and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are deeply browned, 12–15 minutes. Pour in 6 cups low-sodium chicken broth and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits stuck to bottom of pan with a wooden spoon. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until liquid is reduced by half, 40–50 minutes.

Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a heatproof large measuring glass and press on solids to extract any liquid; discard solids. Add more broth if needed to measure 4 cups.
Do ahead: Gravy base can be made 2 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat over medium, stirring occasionally, until warmed through.

Mix ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, 2 tsp. finely chopped rosemary, 2 tsp. finely chopped sage, 2 tsp. finely chopped tarragon, and 2 tsp. finely chopped thyme in a small bowl to combine. Season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Transfer 2 Tbsp. herb butter to another small bowl and set aside for gravy.

Place a rack in lowest position in oven; preheat to 425°. Rinse one 14–16-lb. turkey inside and out; pat dry with paper towels. Starting at neck end, slide your fingers between skin and breast to loosen skin. Rub 4 Tbsp. herb butter over breast meat under skin. Place turkey on a roasting rack set inside a large roasting pan. Season cavity generously with salt and pepper, then stuff with 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, 5 rosemary sprigs, 5 sage sprigs, 5 tarragon sprigs, and 15 thyme sprigs. Loosely tie legs together with kitchen twine; tuck wing tips under. Rub remaining herb butter over outside of turkey; season generously with salt and pepper.

Roast turkey 20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and roast 1 hour, pouring 1 cup low-sodium chicken broth over turkey and adding 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter to pan halfway through. Baste turkey with pan juices, pour another 1 cup low-sodium chicken broth over, and add another 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter to pan. Tent turkey loosely with foil and continue to roast, basting with pan juices and adding 1 cup low-sodium chicken broth and 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter every 45 minutes, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of a thigh registers 175°, 1¾–2 hours longer. Transfer turkey to a platter and let rest 30 minutes.

While the turkey rests, strain pan juices into a medium bowl and whisk in gravy base. Melt reserved 2 Tbsp. herb butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Sprinkle ¼ cup all-purpose flour and cook, whisking constantly, until roux is golden brown, 5–7 minutes. Whisking constantly, gradually pour in pan juice mixture and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, whisking often, until gravy is reduced to about 4½ cups, 8–12 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Carve turkey and serve with gravy alongside.

hibiscus-cranberry-sauce.name: Hibiscus Cranberry Sauce

ingredients.item: (packed) light muscovado sugar or light brown sugar

instructions: Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium-low heat. Add ginger and allspice and cook, stirring occasionally, until butter foams, then browns, 5–8 minutes. Mix in cranberries, muscovado sugar, and ½ cup water. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until cranberries burst, 10–12 minutes.

Uncover cranberries; stir in hibiscus powder, salt, and 1 Tbsp. rum. Reduce heat to low; cook, stirring occasionally, until glossy and syrupy, 16–20 minutes. (Stir in about ¼ cup water if you like a thinner sauce.) Remove from heat and stir in remaining 1 Tbsp. rum. Let cool slightly.

high-protein-energy-bites.name: High-protein Energy Bites
instructions: Mix oats, peanut butter, honey, dark chocolate chips, flax seeds, protein powder, coconut, chia seeds, and coconut extract together in a large bowl; fold in coffee beans. Form mixture into 1-inch balls.
Place cocoa powder in a small bowl. Roll each ball in the cocoa powder until coated.

honey-and-olive-oil-pudding-teleculinari.name: Honey And Olive Oil Pudding
instructions: Pour 150 g of sugar into a pot and wet it with some water. Take it to the fire without moving until you get a caramel. Remove from the fire, water with 50 ml of water and stir well. Caramelize a pudding form and reserve.
Boil the milk with lemon zest to taste. In a bowl, mix the flour with the remaining sugar. Then add the honey, olive oil and eggs and beat well. Add the milk to boil, in yarn and always stirring.
Lay the previous preparation in the form and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, in a sea bath, for about 40 minutes. Remove from the oven, let cool, deform and serve decorated to taste.

honey-lime-sriracha-chicken-poppers.name: Honey Lime Sriracha Chicken Poppers
instructions: Cut chicken breasts into cubes.
In a medium-sized bowl, combine chicken, salt, pepper, garlic, and ginger. Toss until evenly coated.
Place flour and beaten eggs into two separate bowls. Roll each piece of chicken in flour. Then, dip each piece into the eggs until fully covered. Dip into flour one last time for another coat.
Heat oil to 191°C (190°C) in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Fry the coated chicken pieces, in batches, until golden and cooked through, about 10 minutes.
In a saucepan over medium heat, combine butter, honey, Sriracha, soy sauce, and lime juice.
Add chicken and stir until completely covered.
Serve with ranch, blue cheese, or honey!
Nutrition  Calories: 2449 Fat: 195 grams  Carbs: 161 grams Fiber: 2 grams  Sugars: 122 grams  Protein: 25 grams
Enjoy!

honey-chipotle-shrimp-tacos.name: Honey-chipotle Shrimp Tacos

ingredients.item: . adobo sauce from 1 can chipotle chiles in adobo

instructions: Stir 2 Tbsp. adobo sauce and 2 Tbsp. honey in a medium bowl until combined. Add 1 lb. shrimp; season with salt. Toss until shrimp is evenly coated with sauce. Set aside while you prep your toppings.
Mix ½ cup mayonnaise with 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Grate 1 garlic clove into bowl, season with salt, and stir to combine.
Thinly slice ¼ head of cabbage into very thin strips.
Coarsely chop 1 cup cilantro.
Peel and trim 1 onion. Cut in half lengthwise, then thinly slice.
Cut 1 lime in half and squeeze out juice from both halves into another small bowl. Add sliced onion and a pinch of salt. Massage with your hands until onion begins to soften.

Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Working with one at a time, warm tortilla in skillet until pliable and starts to darken, 30–45 seconds per side. Transfer tortillas to a piece of foil and wrap tightly to keep warm.

Return skillet to medium-high heat and pour in 2 Tbsp. oil. Once oil begins to shimmer, add shrimp mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, until shrimps turn pink and cooked through, 1–2 minutes. Remove skillet from heat.
Unwrap tortillas and build tacos with shrimp, cabbage, garlic crema, cilantro, and onions.

honey-garlic-chicken-veggie-skewers.name: Honey-garlic Chicken & Veggie Skewers
instructions: Soak the skewers in water for 5-10 minutes and set aside.
In a bowl with the chicken, add the ingredients for the marinade.
Mix until coated. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to 2 hours.
If baking, preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
Prepare the vegetables by cutting them into 1-inch (2 ½ cm) squares.
Assemble the skewers starting with the red onion, followed by the bell peppers and chicken. Repeat three times.
Place the prepared skewers on a baking sheet and brush with remaining marinade.
Bake or grill for 20-30 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink.
Sprinkle with parsley.
Enjoy!

hot-banana-water.name: Hot Banana Water
instructions: Cut off the ends of the banana peels.
Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
Add 1 banana peel to boiling water.
Turn off heat, cover, and wait for 10 minutes.
Add 1 more banana peel.
Wait 10 more minutes.
Stir to incorporate flavors.
Strain into mugs and serve warm.

hot-sauce-brown-butter.name: Hot Sauce Brown Butter
instructions: Cook butter in a small skillet over medium heat until it foams then browns (be careful not to let it burn), about 5 minutes.
Quickly transfer butter to a small bowl, scraping in browned solids. Let cool.
Chill brown butter 10 minutes. Stir to distribute solids. Continue to chill, stirring every 10 minutes, until butter starts to solidify.
Stir in lemon zest, lemon juice, hot sauce, and salt. Transfer to a piece of plastic; roll into a log. Freeze 1 hour before using.

hot-pink-pearl-onion-pickles.name: Hot-pink Pearl Onion Pickles
instructions: Bring vinegar, sugar, coriander seeds, tarragon, salt, and mint to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar and salt. Reduce heat to a simmer and add onions and beet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onions soften slightly, about 3 minutes. Pluck out and discard beet (the onions will continue to take on color as they sit). Transfer onions and brine to a 1-qt. jar or a nonreactive container and let cool. Cover and chill at least 2 hours before serving. The flavor will mellow as it sits.
Do Ahead: Onions can be pickled 3 weeks ahead. Keep chilled.

how-to-make-a-delicious-chicken-feet-sou.name: How To Make A Delicious Chicken Feet Soup
how-to-make-a-delicious-chicken-feet-sou.original_name: Cómo hacer una rica sopa de patas de pollo
instructions: It cuts carrots, celery, cilantro, onion and reserves everything.
Jumping garlic teeth with cilantro.
Add 1 liter of water into a deep pot, as well as shredded garlic and cook over medium heat. When water boils adds chicken legs and minced vegetables earlier.
Add salt to taste as flavors get together and leave cooking for about 40 minutes.
Serves and enjoys hot.

how-to-make-a-delicious-chilean-casserol.name: How To Make A Delicious Chilean Casserole
how-to-make-a-delicious-chilean-casserol.original_name: Cómo hacer una deliciosa cazuela chilena

ingredients.item: 200 gr de zapallo cortados en cubos
300 gr de papas cortadas en cubos

instructions: We'll start our recipe, washing and cleaning the meat. You'll put her in a pint with half the water and you'll lead to boiling for about 45 minutes till she's soft.
While cooking the meat, heat up a frying pan with oil and you will add onion and pepper. Skip.
He then adds the padded carrot and meat, with salt and pepper to taste and oregano. Mix and seal for about 5 minutes. Turn and put them out.
Once the flesh's soft, you're gonna add the stew we made with the flesh. It's good.
Later, you will add the rest of his water, his zapallo, his potatoes and his occlus. Mix and let cook for 20 minutes.
After that time, put his pits with his pits. Check and finish cooking for another 5 minutes.
Apaga tu hervido, deja reposar un poco y sirve con el perejil troceado.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-and-delicious-chicken-soup-w.name: How To Make And Delicious Chicken Soup With Rice
how-to-make-and-delicious-chicken-soup-w.original_name: Cómo hacer Sopa de Pollo con Arroz fácil y deliciosa

ingredients.item: 1  pollo entero (aproximadamente 1.5 kg, cortado en piezas)
1 taza de arroz blanco de grano largo

instructions: In a big pot, heat up a tablespoon of olive oil at medium heat. Add the pieces of chicken and kitchen till they are golden from both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side. Take the chicken from the pot and put them back.
The same pot adds onion, carrots, celery and garlic. Soak till the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.

The chicken goes back to the pot and adds water, bay leaves and thyme. Take the mixture to boiling, and then reduce the fire and cook with a low heat and cover up for about 45 minutes, or until the chicken is baked and tender.
Meanwhile, rinse the rice under cold water till clear water. Listen to him well.
Remove the chicken pieces from the pot and let them cool till you can manipulate them. Unbound the chicken and scrape it into small pieces. Uncover his bones and his skin.
Add the rice to the pot with chicken stock and vegetables. Cooking with low heat, covered, for about 15- 20 minutes, or till the rice's cooked.
The pitted chicken back into the pot and cook for a few more minutes for flavors to mix. Adjust salt and pepper to taste.
Just before serving, remove the bay leaves and add a minced cilantro and parsley. If you wish, add some drops of lemon juice to give you a touch of freshness.

how-to-make-andalusian-stew-step-by-step.name: How To Make Andalusian Stew, Step By Step
how-to-make-andalusian-stew-step-by-step.original_name: Cómo hacer cocido andaluz, paso a paso
instructions: As we have explained at first, it's necessary to remove the chickpeas during the night before the production of the Andalusian cooking. So we'll take this step for granted.
Now we'll have an onion and garlic. We'll fight the first and we'll get them into tiny cubes. We will also peel our garlic teeth and mince them into very thin sheets with the help of a sharp knife.

We will also peel our potatoes and mingle them into medium pieces (if you wish to favor the distribution of starch at the ground and to thickle them, do not completely separate them with the knife but end with broken with his hand and to "cavern them").

In the case of carrot, we will skin and cut them into pieces. At the pimenton's, we will have to wash and dry it, before we remove his head and his seeds, and then mingle it into julian (without his white parts from inside).
Luego, vamos a lavar las carnes y retirarles el exceso de grasa, si lo tuvieran.

Now we're going to heat up an oil chorrit in a frying pan, at medium low heat. When hot, we'll cook his onion and garlic minced, for 5 minutes, stirring often and keeping an eye on them from going to be golden or toasted. The ideal would be rather that the onion became clear.
After this time, we will add the carrot pitted onto wheels and the pimenton julian. We'll let them cook for 3 more minutes and turn them off.
The following will be to get a big pot, and we'll cook the plate. We'll put her on the fire and put the butter back.

Mientras se calienta, escurriremos los garbanzos remojados, los enjuagaremos y los volveremos a escurrir, antes de ponerlos en la olla con la manteca. Rehogaremos durante 10 minutos, removiendo con frecuencia.
Luego, salaremos ligeramente los garbanzos y los mezclaremos, antes de colocar las carnes en la olla, y cubrir con los vegetales salteados y los trozos de papas.

Enseguida vamos a agregar agua a la olla, hasta cubrir todos los ingredientes. Con el fuego a media intensidad, taparemos la olla. Esperaremos a que el contenido de la olla empiece a hervir y a partir de entonces, dejaremos que se cocine durante 50 minutos.
During cooking, we will come back every 15 minutes to clear the pot and remove the foam layer that will form onto the surface with the help of a kitchen spoon.

When the necessary cooking time is up, we will have to have the cooking tested and, if necessary, we will have a more salt and we will have to correct that. If we do, we'll have to mix all the ingredients again. We'll also have the chickenpods to see if they're already tender. If you are still not satisfied with its consistency, let the pot cook for a few more minutes and re-test them as you come back, till you are convinced. Then put out the fire.

That's all. Your Andalusian cook's ready to serve. You can choose to serve each portion in a deep plate, or to serve it in two time, one with a broth and another with solid ingredients, accompanied by a piece of bread.

how-to-make-apple-fritters-step-by-step-.name: How To Make Apple Fritters: Step By Step
how-to-make-apple-fritters-step-by-step-.original_name: Cómo hacer buñuelos de manzana: paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1  manzana grande (tipo fuji, honeycrisp o gala)
Additional sugars and cinnamon for sprinkle

instructions: Wash, weigh and cut the apple into small cubes or thin slices as you prefer more creamy or with more marked pieces.
In a bowl, beat the egg with sugar and vanilla until the mixture is sparkling.
Add milk little by little and continue to bat.
En otro recipiente, mezcla la harina, el polvo de hornear, la canela y la pizca de sal.
It incorporates the dry ingredients into the moist mixture to achieve a homogenous, slightly thick mass.
Add apple pieces and mix well to cover them completely.
Warm the oil into a deep frying pan with medium heat (about 170 and 3).
With a spoon, it takes portions of dough and frying them till they are golden from both sides.
Put fringes on absorbing paper to remove excess fat.
Drain with sugar and cinnamon while they are still hot.
Serves tibia with honey

how-to-make-baked-trout-with-almonds-com.name: How To Make Baked Trout With Almonds
how-to-make-baked-trout-with-almonds-com.original_name: Cómo hacer trucha al horno con almendras

ingredients.item: 2  truchas frescas enteras, limpias y sin espinas grandes  ((aprox. 300 g cada una))
40 gr  de almendras fileteadas o picadas groseramente
2 cdas  de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)
1 / 2 cdite of sweet peppermint or smoked paprika
½ pumpkin and ½ carrot cut into fine cane (to be accompanied inside the plate)

instructions: To purify the oven to 190 been 3 been.
Wash and dry the trout well. Do small surface cuts to skin to better absorb flavors.
Filling each trout with salt, pepper, lemon frilling and some olive oil.
Rellenar el interior con eneldo, tomillo y un toque de ajo picado.
In a small frying pan, toast the steamed almonds till they are golden and reserve.

At the same frying pan, melt butter with a few drops of olive oil, add the remaining garlic and pimenton, stirring quickly so that it doesn't burn. Incorporate the white wine and let them reduce a few minutes.
Put the trout onto an oven plate and add about the pumpkin and carrot. Roast with butter, garlic and wine.
Bake for 20 minutes or till meat is tender and takes off easily with a fork.
Remove from the oven, sprinkle the roasted almonds above and a chorrit of fresh lemon juice before serving.

how-to-make-chinese-salad-pequerecetas.name: How To Make Chinese Salad
instructions: Ponemos en un bol con agua las fibras de agar-agar a hidratar durante un par de horas.
We mix into a bowl the vinegar of rice and sugar and mix with some rods or with the hand mixer with them until they start whitening. We added sunflower oil and a pint of salt and mix again. Reserve

We cut into fine cane carrot and ham York. We put into a bowl or salad the iceberg lettuce, the carrot, ham York and the agar-agar algae already hydrated. We have been ingesting with the white fruit sauce We serve

how-to-make-cloud-eggs-comedera.name: How To Make Cloud Eggs
instructions: Begins the recipe and preheats the oven at 175 ° C
Ahora, toma los dos huevos y separa las yemas y las claras. Coloca cada una en recipientes separados.
Agrega las 4 claras que tienes aparte con las que separaste.
Beat the lights with an electrical stick or a manual beaker up to the snow point. They have to have a great deal of volume and texture.
Una vez tengas tus claras listas, forra una bandeja con papel de cocina. Agrega algunas gotas de aceite de oliva en la superficie.
With the help of a spoonful, put the clear snow about the plate and give them a cloud shape. Then it opens up a space at the centre without getting to the bottom.
Coloca la yema en el centro procurando que no se desmorone.
Condimenta con sal al gusto y hornea por aproximadamente 7 minutos.

The cooking time will depend on your oven. That's why I recommend you bake it 3 minutes in 3. Check the first 3 minutes and evaluate how your eggs look, if they're still soft, cook for a few more minutes.
Las yemas deben quedar blanditas y las claras con mayor textura.

instructions: We prepared the dressage In a bowl we prepared the tidal for salmon. To do this, we wash our lemons well with hot water, we dry them and we scrape their lemon skin. It's better to leave them with their skin because that's how they'll protect the lower part from being done too much. Once we have been done we can easily remove his skin. We can add half a lemon into his bucket to get his smell out.

We program the air fryer We program the air fryer for 8 - 10 minutes at 200 been 3 been. Depending on our air fryer and how we love salmon, time may vary slightly, so we advise you to first check salmon cooking at your frying frying without oil to leave it at your best.

We withdraw salmon once we have been through time, we check that salmon is well made. To do this with a knife we can carefully cut into the thickest part of salmon. The salmon should be slightly translucent inside and opaque to the outside. We get him out of the air frying with some pincas with care so that it doesn't break.

3-hour-pizza.name: 3-hour Pizza
instructions: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook, combine the flour, sugar, salt, and instant yeast. Start mixing on low speed. Stream in the olive oil and water and mix for 2 minutes, until the flour is incorporated.
Increase the mixer speed to medium, and mix for 6–8 minutes more, until the dough is smooth and elastic.
Lightly grease a large bowl with olive oil. Transfer the dough to the bowl, cover with a kitchen towel, and let rest for 1½ hours.

Turn the risen dough onto a clean surface and shape into a ball, pulling the edges round and tight across the surface of the dough ball. Return to the bowl, cover, and let rest for another 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).

Turn out the dough onto a lightly oiled surface. Divide the dough into 2 equal portions. Liberally grease a baking sheet with olive oil. Place a portion of dough on the pan and stretch to fit the baking sheet. Repeat with the remaining portion of dough, or reserve for a later use.
Top the dough with the crushed tomatoes and mozzarella.
Bake the pizza for 15–20 minutes, until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Top the pizza with flaky salt and basil. Use scissors to cut the pizza, then serve.
Enjoy!
